subcodes.first_line: As to the matter of "Verily, We have chosen": God foresaw the preparation and arrangements one thousand three hundred years before [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: و امّا مسئله قد اصطفينا خدا تهيّأ و تدارک را هزار و سيصد سال پيش از اين ديد
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @avoidance of Covenant-Breakers, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha
